name: node-wrappy
title: node-wrappy
description:
Callback wrapping utility
Returns a wrapper function that returns a wrapped callback
The wrapper function should do some stuff, and return a
presumably different callback function.
This makes sure that own properties are retained, so that
decorations and such are not lost along the way.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-wrappy because Callback wrapping utility.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-wrappy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-wrappy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-wrappy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
